name: Gmail (Read-only)
description: Read-only Gmail + Google Calendar tools. Includes an OAuth login CLI (`openclaw gmail login`).

clientSecret.description: Google OAuth Client Secret (Desktop app). Stored locally in ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json.

redirectUri.description: OAuth redirect URI (must be loopback). Example: http://127.0.0.1:42813/oauth2/callback

allowEmails.description: Optional allowlist of Gmail addresses that can be used by this integration.

allowCalendarWrite.description: When enabled, allows creating calendar events (email stays read-only). Requires re-login for new OAuth scopes.
